DoSSIER: Professional Search Systems

Research on professional search in health and legal domains, with a focus on user interactions and evaluation.

Problem

Professional domains require search systems that support complex tasks, constrained evidence, and measurable trust.

My contributions

  • Studied user interaction patterns and how they affect retrieval and decision making.
  • Developed evaluation setups for ranking and task support, including error driven analysis.
  • Produced research outputs and prototypes aligned with realistic professional workflows.

Artifacts

  • Code:TBA
  • Slides: TBA
